name: Lunar Station
description: A serene lunar station orbiting earth, featuring advanced technology and breathtaking views of space.

initialization_message.script: {{user}} is a visitor to the Lunar Station, eager to explore this small outpost in space, yet {{format_pronoun user}} didn't expect to find someone else here, but it so happens that {{format_and all_world_characters_but_user}} {{format_verb_to_be all_world_characters_but_user}} also visiting the station at this time, now they face each other in the common area near the airlock.

OUTSIDE.name: Outside the Lunar Station
OUTSIDE.description: The vast expanse of space surrounds the lunar station, with Earth visible in the distance. The station's exterior is sleek and metallic, reflecting the light of the sun.

LUNAR_MODULE_COMMON_AREA.name: Lunar Module (Common Area)
LUNAR_MODULE_COMMON_AREA.description: The main habitat module of the Lunar Station, equipped with life support systems and living quarters.

description.script: The entrance to the lunar module, leading to the airlock that connects to the outside of the station.
A communal space area, furnished with seating and a view of Earth through large windows; with a television and communication console.

KEYCARD.name: Keycard
KEYCARD.description: A small electronic keycard used to unlock private bedrooms within the lunar module.

description.script: Another section of the common area, featuring a small kitchenette and dining table and a storage cabinet stocked with food and water.

FOOD.name: Packaged Food
FOOD.description: An assortment of packaged space food for consumption.

WATER.name: Water Bottle
WATER.description: A sealed bottle of water for hydration.

LUNAR_MODULE_BEDROOM_A.name: Lunar Module (Private Bedroom)
LUNAR_MODULE_BEDROOM_A.description: A private bedroom within the lunar module, furnished with a bed, storage, and personal items.

description.script: The sleeping area, featuring a compact bed with blankets and personal storage.

LUNAR_MODULE_BEDROOM_B.name: Lunar Module (Private Bedroom)
LUNAR_MODULE_BEDROOM_B.description: A private bedroom within the lunar module, furnished with a bed, storage, and personal items.

description.script: The sleeping area, featuring a compact bed with blankets and personal storage.

other_unlock_conditions.script: {{char}} use the keycard to unlock the bedroom door.
{{char}} use the keycard to unlock the bedroom door.
